Purpose: Compare current Treasurer duties with proposed Treasurer, Bookkeeper, committee, and outside vendor responsibilities.. Current status: Draft. Related committee/body: Finance Committee, Personnel Committee, Treasurer, Bookkeeper, Nominating Committee. Handbook: Maybe. Open questions: Which duty split changes require bylaw review, committee approval, or church vote?. File name: docs/policies/spending-authority-policy.md. Type of document: Policy. Purpose: Define spending categories, approval paths, and placeholder thresholds.. Current status: Draft. Related committee/body: Finance Committee, Congregation if vote required. Handbook: Yes. Open questions: What dollar thresholds and church vote triggers apply?. File name: docs/policies/financial-authority-policy-package.md. Type of document: Policy review package. Purpose: Coordinate spending, reimbursement, payment-card, exception, and congregational approval decisions.. Current status: Needs Finance Review. Related committee/body: Finance Committee, Treasurer, Congregation if required. Handbook: No. Open questions: Which thresholds and approval paths should Finance recommend?. File name: docs/policies/reimbursement-policy.md. Type of document: Policy. Purpose: Define reimbursement documentation, routine expense treatment, pre-approval needs, and review process.. Current status: Draft. Related committee/body: Finance Committee. Handbook: Yes. Open questions: Who approves routine reimbursements, and what submission deadline applies?. File name: docs/policies/credit-card-policy.md. Type of document: Policy. Purpose: Define controlled payment/card use, cardholder responsibilities, receipt rules, monthly review, and revocation.. Current status: Draft. Related committee/body: Finance Committee. Handbook: Yes. Open questions: What card/payment method should KBC use and who may hold cards?. File name: docs/policies/offering-counting-and-deposit-policy.md. Type of document: Policy. Purpose: Define controls for counting, recording, and depositing offerings.. Current status: Draft. Related committee/body: Finance Committee, Treasurer, Bookkeeper. Handbook: Yes. Open questions: What current counting process is used and what controls are required?. File name: docs/policies/monthly-financial-review-policy.md. Type of document: Policy. Purpose: Define monthly review items for reports, reconciliations, budget status, and exceptions.. Current status: Draft. Related committee/body: Finance Committee, Treasurer. Handbook: Yes. Open questions: What exact monthly packet should be required?. Related committee/body: Finance Committee, Congregation if vote required. Handbook: Yes. Open questions: What level of review is appropriate for KBC and who performs it?. File name: docs/procedures/weekly-bookkeeping-checklist.md. Type of document: Procedure / checklist. Purpose: Provide repeatable contribution, transaction, documentation, payment-preparation, and exception steps.. Current status: Needs Finance Review. Related committee/body: Bookkeeper, Treasurer, Finance Committee. Handbook: Yes. Open questions: Who performs each step, who reviews exceptions, and what weekly cutoff applies?. File name: docs/procedures/monthly-close-checklist.md. Type of document: Procedure / checklist. Purpose: Provide repeatable account reconciliation, fund review, mission-allocation, payroll review, reporting, and close steps.. Current status: Needs Finance Review. Related committee/body: Bookkeeper, Treasurer, Finance Committee. Handbook: Yes. Open questions: What accounts, reports, deadlines, and independent review are required each month?. File name: docs/procedures/monthly-finance-committee-meeting-checklist.md. Type of document: Procedure / checklist. Purpose: Provide recurring monthly Finance Committee meeting checklist for income/expenses, budget, designated funds, cards, reimbursements, recurring payments, exceptions, votes, and business meeting reporting.. Current status: Needs Finance Review. Related committee/body: Finance Committee, Treasurer, Bookkeeper. Handbook: Yes. Open questions: Who prepares the packet, records decisions, and maintains the checklist?. File name: docs/procedures/payroll-process.md. Type of document: Procedure.
